name: Make It Look Easy
overview: LE SSERAFIM, one of K-Pop's leading groups, has returned with their second documentary taking a deep dive into the intense journey the group has faced since their debut, giving fans an intimate look at their struggles, growth, and determination.  Following the success of their debut documentary, 'The World Is My Oyster', this documentary explores the highs and lows of 2023 and beyond. From preparing for year-end performances to embarking on U.S. promotions and their solo tour, 'Make It Look Easy' highlights their relentless work ethic and personal reflections. Fans can expect raw and honest moments from the members as they share their journey.

trailers.title: LE SSERAFIM (르세라핌) Documentary 'Make It Look Easy' TRAILER 01
